PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\('localhost', 5432\); "PostgreSQL porta 5432: ABERTA" } catch { "PostgreSQL porta 5432: FECHADA — $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })
